summary: The diff implements all four requirements reasonably well. REQ-1 (full-width responsive header), REQ-2 (3-level desktop navigation with hover dropdowns/flyouts), REQ-3 (hamburger menu with accordion mobile navigation), and REQ-4 (bold jewel-toned theme with transitions) are all addressed. One notable gap is keyboard accessibility for all three levels as required by REQ-2 — the diff shows partial keyboard handling (Enter/Space/Escape on Level 2 items) but Level 1 and Level 3 items lack explicit keyboard event handlers visible in the truncated diff. The constraint against modifying files under frontend/src/hooks/ appears respected.

missing_requirements.requirement: All three levels are keyboard-accessible (Tab + Enter/Space/Escape)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows keyboard handlers (onKeyDown) only on Level 2 items in the truncated Header.tsx. Level 1 items and Level 3 items do not show explicit keyboard event handlers in the visible code, making full keyboard accessibility across all three levels unconfirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: A hero section, feature cards grid, interaction instructions panel, and footer are rendered in App.tsx beyond the header navigation demo.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a responsive header with 3-level navigation. Additional page content like a hero section, feature cards, and footer were not requested.
